response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrable leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and deep exposure to cloud tools and agentic workflows, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and formal AI/CS advanced degrees — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Extensive cloud and distributed systems experience (AWS, Kubernetes, microservices)
Strong technical leadership and mentorship demonstrated through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solution development
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
No advanced degree in AI/CS; education limited to BS in Computer Science
